parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const prompt = `You are an expert AI news analyst. Analyze these ${data.totalArticles} articles and create a high-value daily briefing.

ARTICLES:
${JSON.stringify(data.articles)}

${data.errors.length > 0 ? 'Feed errors: ' + JSON.stringify(data.errors) : ''}

RULES:
- Focus on the most important and impactful stories. Skip low-value or repetitive noise.
- Merge duplicate stories (same event from different sources) into one entry, listing all sources.
- Organize by topic, not by source.
- Aim for 10-15 top stories total. Quality over quantity.
- Rate each story: HIGH = industry-changing, MED = notable development, LOW = incremental/niche.

FORMAT:

# AI News Digest - ${data.dateLabel}

## TL;DR - 30 Second Briefing
3-4 bullet points. Only the stories that matter most. Write like you're briefing a busy exec.

## The Big Picture
2-3 sentences connecting today's stories into broader narratives (e.g. safety trends, market shifts, regulatory patterns). This is the insight you can't get from just reading headlines.

## [Topic Category]
- **[HIGH/MED/LOW]** [Article title](url) (Source1, Source2)
  One-line summary of why it matters

Categories: AI Policy & Regulation, AI Industry & Business, AI Products & Launches, AI Research & Papers, AI Infrastructure & Tools, AI Commentary & Opinion, Other AI News

Skip empty categories.

## Worth Watching
Emerging trends and threads to follow based on today's news.

Output only the markdown.`;

const body = {
  model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
  max_tokens: 4096,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }]
};

return [{ json: { body } }];
